name: Gold Kada Bangle Set
description: A set of four hand-rolled 22kt gold kadas, each etched with a fine paisley motif along the outer face. The gentle chime as they move is a sound synonymous with celebration. Ideal as a wedding gift or trousseau piece.
careInstructions: Store in a soft cloth pouch. Avoid chemical exposure. Have cleaned by a jeweller annually.
shipping: Ships within 5–7 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
